book_integration.caveat: sleeve streams in-sample; live haircut expected (SMC-0070 1.52->0.43); 4-6wk paper phase-0 is the gate; decorrelation (~0 corr) is the robust part

cti_swap_research.source: Switch Markets 2025-06 (representative MT5; CTI cut swaps ~50%)
cti_swap_research.key_finding: I0100 edge = gated TIMING (Sharpe 1.06 at carry=0), swap is ADDITIVE not the driver -> CTI swap-table is NOT the kill-gate (unlike I0090). Realistic +1.3% swap -> gated Sharpe 1.18 (IS/OOS +1.03/+1.36).
cti_swap_research.construction_note: long-only basket is swap-correct (all 5 pay negative short-swap; L/S short-leg would be swap-unfavorable)
